name: archangl-plugin-marketplace
description: archangl's personal Claude Code plugin collection.

plugins.name: archangl-studio
plugins.description: Creative production skills for cinematic ad and video-gen workflows, starting with improve-shotlist (emotion-to-camera-language translation).

plugins.name: archangl-search
plugins.description: Multi-source research orchestrator that routes through the Exa and Firecrawl provider skills. Depends on both (auto-installed from this marketplace).

plugins.name: exa
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of the Exa plugin: hosted Exa MCP server plus the search and agent research skills.

plugins.name: firecrawl-workflows
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Firecrawl Workflows: 16 outcome-focused Firecrawl skills for research, SEO, QA, knowledge bases, and more.

plugins.name: archangl-pocock
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Matt Pocock's skills (mattpocock/skills): 21 promoted engineering and productivity skills for real engineering — grilling, TDD, triage, code review, domain modeling, and more. Pinned verbatim, no upstream tracking.

plugins.name: apify
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of the official Apify plugin (apify/apify-claude-code-plugin): hosted Apify MCP server (mcp.apify.com, OAuth), an apify routing subagent, and five Actor-development skills.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Corey Haines' marketingskills: 47 marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, and growth.
